project_description: Automatic product description generation in telco catalogue using LLM. Templates per product category, tone of voice guidelines, A/B conversion tests AI vs manual descriptions, editor approval workflow, PIM (Product Information Management) integration, 10k products to describe.
client_history: Client has PIM with 10k products — descriptions written manually by editors.
risk_patterns: LLM generates content requiring verification — approval workflow critical.
pm_comment: Calibrating prompts per product category took longer than assumed — many iterations with editors.
